title: Reviving Medicinal Plants in Mysuru
summary: Working with local communities to conserve, propagate and sustainably harvest native medicinal plants across the Mysuru landscape.

title: Bamboo Livelihoods for the Medara Community
summary: Supporting the Medara scheduled tribe to build sustainable livelihoods through bamboo cultivation and craft.

title: Training Volunteers to Plant & Protect
summary: Hands-on workshops turning students and farmers into local champions for trees and biodiversity.
